summary: Deprecated audit trail for the Visual Studio IntelliSense cache tweak. Microsoft documents IntelliSense performance broadly, but this research pass did not capture a primary Microsoft registry contract for DisableAutoUpdating.

setting.name: Visual Studio IntelliSense Auto-updating
setting.casual_explanation: The app tries to influence how Visual Studio updates IntelliSense information. This can matter on very large solutions, but it is not a normal Windows setting.
setting.why_people_change_it: People would change it to tune code completion responsiveness or background IntelliSense behavior on large Visual Studio workloads.
setting.tradeoffs_overview: IntelliSense tuning can affect editor responsiveness, but this research pass did not capture a primary Microsoft registry mapping for the value written by the app.
setting.professional_notes: Microsoft documents Visual Studio performance guidance and IntelliSense-related features, but this pass did not capture a primary Microsoft source that publishes HKCU\Software\Microsoft\VisualStudio\IntelliSense\DisableAutoUpdating as the supported control surface. The current app writes 0 there, which is tracked only as an observed implementation.

allowed_values.label: Primary Visual Studio mapping not captured
allowed_values.meaning: This research pass did not capture a primary Microsoft source that publishes DisableAutoUpdating as a supported Visual Studio registry setting.

allowed_values.label: Observed app profile
allowed_values.meaning: The current app writes 0 here to keep IntelliSense auto-updating enabled for its current optimization profile.

targets.notes: Tracked as an observed Visual Studio registry mapping only.

app_current_implementation.notes: The current app writes DisableAutoUpdating = 0, but this pass did not capture a primary Microsoft registry contract for that Visual Studio value.

windows_defaults.label: Conservative baseline
windows_defaults.applies_to: Visual Studio user profiles where this dataset has not validated the IntelliSense registry contract

states.rationale: Do not publish the IntelliSense registry write as validated until a primary Microsoft source is captured.

windows_defaults.notes: This keeps the Visual Studio tuning record honest without overstating confidence in the registry path.

recommended_profiles.label: Hold for research

states.rationale: Keep the registry write blocked until a primary Microsoft source is captured.

recommended_profiles.good_when: You want to document the current IntelliSense tweak without publishing it as a validated Visual Studio control.
recommended_profiles.bad_when: You need a fully sourced Visual Studio IntelliSense record.
tradeoffs: The registry mapping remains blocked from validated publication.

recommended_profiles.label: Current app profile

states.rationale: Observed registry value written by the current app.

recommended_profiles.good_when: You are documenting the app's current Visual Studio behavior for later cleanup.
recommended_profiles.bad_when: You want a sourced Visual Studio IntelliSense control.
tradeoffs: The product's current write is captured.
The exact registry mapping is not yet validated from a primary Microsoft source.
recommended_profiles.notes: Blocked until a primary Microsoft source for DisableAutoUpdating is captured or the product moves to a documented Visual Studio control surface.

evidence.title: Microsoft Learn: Optimize Visual Studio performance
evidence.summary: Microsoft documents Visual Studio performance tuning and IntelliSense-related workload guidance, but this research pass did not capture a primary registry contract for DisableAutoUpdating.

decision.why: The feature area is well understood, but this research pass did not capture a primary Microsoft registry contract for the exact Visual Studio value written by the app.
blocking_issues: No primary Microsoft source for HKCU\Software\Microsoft\VisualStudio\IntelliSense\DisableAutoUpdating was captured in this pass.
The current record can document the app behavior, but not validate it as the supported Visual Studio control surface.

validation_proof.exact_quote_or_path: Microsoft Learn: Optimize Visual Studio performance: Microsoft documents Visual Studio performance tuning and IntelliSense-related workload guidance, but this research pass did not capture a primary registry contract for DisableAutoUpdating.
validation_proof.notes: Backfilled from evidence_id vs-performance-doc (official-doc); deprecated audit trail.
